The Story

Behind the Lens

A look into our creative philosophy, technical gear, and the story of Tharu Photography.

Meet the Photographer

Hello, I'm Tharu.

Photography, to me, is the art of pausing time to capture feeling. I started my journey with a simple vintage film camera, fascinated by how light could transform ordinary spaces into moments of quiet beauty.

Over the last three years, Tharu Photography has grown into a boutique creative studio dedicated to documenting weddings, elopements, and individual portraits. We approach every session as a collaborative editorial project. We steer away from rigid, overly staged setups, choosing instead to guide our subjects into comfortable spaces where their genuine personalities shine.

3+

Years Active

70+

Stories Captured

3K+

Delivered Images

100%

Happy Clients

Our Core Pillars

Creative Philosophy

Natural Light Focus

We study the movement of the sun, chasing soft morning haze and the rich, golden warm light of late afternoons to paint our subjects naturally.

Unscripted Moments

While we guide you with gentle directions, our true focus is the in-between laughs, quiet sighs, and real expressions that showcase the heart.

Minimalist Framing

Our compositions prioritize breathing room, thin clean lines, and an editorial crop style that removes distractions and highlights the core story.

Technical Details

The Equipment

We believe that equipment should empower creativity, not define it. We select top-tier full-frame and medium-format bodies coupled with ultra-wide aperture prime lenses to ensure unmatched detail, texture rendering, and dynamic range in all lighting situations.

Camera Bodies

  • Sony Alpha 7R V (61MP Ultra Resolution)
  • Fujifilm GFX 50S II (Medium Format Depth)

Prime Lenses

  • Sony FE 50mm f/1.2 GM (Signature Portrait)
  • Sony FE 85mm f/1.4 GM (High-Compression Bokeh)
  • Fujinon GF 80mm f/1.7 R WR (Medium Format Warmth)

Editing Suite

  • Capture One Pro (Raw Development)
  • Adobe Lightroom Classic
  • Bespoke Film Grain Emulations

Let's craft your story together.

Reach out to share your project dates, style ideas, and locations. We look forward to working with you.

Get In Touch

Capturing pure emotion, editorial portraits, and fine-art lifestyle photography with quiet elegance.
